questionHtml:
At room temperature, water is a liquid and methane is a gas. Which molecular property explains this difference?

A. Higher molecular mass of water

B. Dipolarity of water

C. Presence of more hydrogen in methane

D. Higher boiling point of methane

meta.title: At room temperature, water is a liquid and methane is a gas. Which molecular property explains this difference? A. Higher molecular mass of water B. Dipolarity of water C. Presence
